recentDecisions: Phase 5 = explorer drill-in (Enter on Content tab items → file tree + preview). DONE.
Phase 6 = Gallery Grid for Loadouts/Registries + Registry Validation (warn unnamed hooks/MCP)
Phase 7 = Modals expansion: [r] Rename becomes [e] Edit with two-field modal (name + description). Install/uninstall wizard. Loadout apply/remove confirmation. Help overlay (? key).
Phase 8 = Toasts, Phase 9 = Search extension, Phase 10 = Polish
Explorer drill-in mirrors library pattern: explorerMode enum, drillIn(), loadSelectedFile(), viewDetail(), file tree + preview split
Double-click on explorer item row also drills in (same as library)
Release skill uninstalled from all 7 providers (was test artifact)
nextSteps: 1. COMMIT+PUSH this session's changes (explorer drill-in + Phase 6 spec + roadmap docs)
2. PHASE 6 — GALLERY GRID: Implement gallery.go, cards.go, contents.go per spec at docs/specs/tui-phase6-gallery.md
3. PHASE 6 — REGISTRY VALIDATION: Add checkNamingWarnings() to scanner, naming quality check to doctor command
4. PHASE 7 — when Phase 6 is done: modals, edit modal, install/uninstall wizard, help overlay

context.notes: All 22 test packages passing. Binary rebuilt. Explorer now has full browse/detail mode parity with Library. The explorer detail mode reuses fileTreeModel, loadSelectedFile pattern, and the same bordered frame assembly with T-junctions.
context.tuiFiles: app.go, explorer.go, library.go, table.go, filetree.go, items.go, preview.go, topbar.go, helpbar.go, styles.go, keys.go, modal.go, metapanel.go
context.phase6Spec: docs/specs/tui-phase6-gallery.md — covers Gallery Grid (cards.go, gallery.go, contents.go) + Registry Validation (scanner warnings, doctor check). Build order: card data model → card grid → contents sidebar → gallery model → app integration → registry validation → tests.
context.phase7Scope: Edit modal (name + description, replaces rename), install/uninstall wizard, loadout apply/remove confirmation, help overlay. [r]→[e] shortcut change.

previousSessions.summary: Phase 4+ COMPLETE. Metadata panel as reusable bordered component across all tabs. Hook script bundling shipped. Multiple UX improvements: R refresh, q backs out, transparent modal, double-click drill-in, rename button.
Hook/MCP naming feature complete. MCP scanner fix shipped. Clickable sort headers. Input field styling. Hook script bundling design decisions captured.
TUI v3 Phase 3 complete. Naming feature started — scanner DisplayName heuristics and CLI rename command shipped.
